description: Organization demonstrates a complex struct with nested person references.

description.description: Description is information about the organization.

state.description: State is the state or province.

postalCode.description: PostalCode is the postal or zip code.

employees.description: Employees is a list of people that work for the organization.

items.description: Person demonstrates a complex struct with nested fields and embedded types.

name.description: Name is the person's full name.

birthDate.description: BirthDate is the person's date of birth. This demonstrates using the time.Time type which will be properly handled.. Must be an RFC3339 formatted date-time string (e.g., "2006-01-02T15:04:05Z07:00")

email.description: Email is the primary email address.

phone.description: Phone is the primary phone number.

alternateEmails.description: AlternateEmails contains additional email addresses. COMMENTED OUT: Map fields are not yet supported  AlternatePhones contains additional phone numbers with labels. AlternatePhones map[string]string `json:"alternatePhones,omitempty"`

tags.description: Tags are arbitrary labels associated with the person. COMMENTED OUT: Map fields are not yet supported  Metadata contains any additional information.  Using map[string]interface{} allows for arbitrary JSON. Metadata map[string]any `json:"metadata,omitempty"`

departments.description: Departments is a tree structure of departments within the organization.

items.description: Department represents a division within an organization.

manager.description: Manager is the person in charge of the department.

name.description: Name is the person's full name.

birthDate.description: BirthDate is the person's date of birth. This demonstrates using the time.Time type which will be properly handled.. Must be an RFC3339 formatted date-time string (e.g., "2006-01-02T15:04:05Z07:00")

email.description: Email is the primary email address.

phone.description: Phone is the primary phone number.

alternateEmails.description: AlternateEmails contains additional email addresses. COMMENTED OUT: Map fields are not yet supported  AlternatePhones contains additional phone numbers with labels. AlternatePhones map[string]string `json:"alternatePhones,omitempty"`

tags.description: Tags are arbitrary labels associated with the person. COMMENTED OUT: Map fields are not yet supported  Metadata contains any additional information.  Using map[string]interface{} allows for arbitrary JSON. Metadata map[string]any `json:"metadata,omitempty"`

parentDepartment.description: ParentDepartment is the name of the parent department, if any. COMMENTED OUT: Recursive/circular references are not yet supported  SubDepartments demonstrates recursive structures.  This creates a tree structure of departments. SubDepartments []Department `json:"subDepartments,omitempty"`
